chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ أَكَلَ أَوْ شَرِبَ نَاسِياً فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – The one who eats or drinks out of forgetfulness during the Month of Ramazan

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/271)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/271)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: الرَّجُلِ يَنْسَى فَيَأْكُلُ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ قَالَ يُتِمُّ صَوْمَهُ فَإِنَّمَا هُوَ شَيْ‏ءٌ أَطْعَمَهُ اللَّهُ إِيَّاهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Dawood Bin Sirham,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the man who forgets, so he eats during the Month of Ramazan. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He should complete his Fast. So, rather, it is something which Allah<sup>azwj</sup> has Fed it to him’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr from Dawud ibn Sarhan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who out of forgetfulness eats and drinks in the month of Ramadan, has said, ‘He completes his fast, it is only something Allah fed him.’”
